items.title: Boeing’s China Jet Talks And Defense Push Confront NASA And Culture Risks
items.description: Boeing is reportedly close to a landmark agreement to sell about 500 aircraft to China, its largest prospective order from the country in years. The company is also part of a new U.S. initiative to significantly increase munitions production, with President Trump announcing an agreement among major defense contractors. NASA is terminating a substantial portion of a multibillion dollar moon rocket contract with Boeing, citing delays and cost overruns. Regulators and investigators are...

items.title: NASA Eyes Boeing-Lockheed Rocket Component For Moon Mission As Costs Skyrocket: Report
items.description: NASA is reportedly seeking rocket components from Boeing Co. and Lockheed Martin Corp's joint venture, the United Launch Alliance (ULA). Costs Ballooned In a report by Bloomberg on Wednesday, it was said that the Exploration Upper Stage of the agency's Space Launch System, which has been built by Boeing, has been plagued by delays and costs ballooning to over $2.8 billion. items.title: Boeing Sends Liquid Robots to Defend Japan
items.description: Boeing builds expensive airplanes -- but very affordable drone ships for the military.

items.title: How China is challenging the U.S. to become the next great space power
items.description: A new report warns that the U.S. could lose its dominance in space to China in the next few years.

items.title: Iran says it struck UAE air base shortly after Iranian president's vow not to hit neighbors
items.description: The U.S. says it has hit more than 3,000 Iranian targets in the first week of the war, as Iran's president vows to halt attacks on neighbors.
